timeline.event: An haife shi a Hanseong Junsubang a matsayin ɗa na uku na Sarki Taejong da Sarauniya Wongyeong.
Lokacin da yayan shi Yarima Yangnyeong ya rasa matsayinsa, aka naɗa shi a matsayin sabon magajin gado.
Ya gaji karagar mulki daga Taejong kuma ya zama sarki na huɗu na Joseon a Gyeongbokgung Geunjeongjeon.
Ya naɗa Yi Jong-mu a matsayin kwamanda na sojojin ruwa, ya tura shi da jiragen ruwa 227 da sojoji 17,000 don mamaye Tsushima.
Ya kafa Cibiyar Jiphyeonjeon a cikin fadar don gudanar da tsarin tsakiya da bincike kan manufofin kasa.
An kebe shi daga bayar da kyautar 'yan mata, zinare da azurfa ga daular Ming.
Rundunar da Kim Jong-seo ke jagoranta ta kawar da mutanen Jurchen a yankin Hamgil-do, kuma suka kafa yankuna shida don fadada yankin arewa.
Ganin cewa talakawa suna fuskantar wahala wajen koyon haruffan Hanja na kasar Sin, ya kirkiri haruffa 28 da kansa.
Ya fitar da haruffan Hunminjeongeum da ya kirkira da kansa a hukumance.
Yanayin rashin lafiyarsa ya yi tsanani, kuma ya mutu bayan ya koma gidan Yarima Yeongeung.

keyAchievements.title: Kirkirar Hunminjeongeum
keyAchievements.description: Ya kirkiri Hunminjeongeum, wani ingantaccen tsarin haruffa na kimiyya wanda talakawa zasu iya koyo cikin sauki.

keyAchievements.title: Taimakawa wajen ci gaban Kimiyya da Fasaha
keyAchievements.description: Ya ba da cikakken goyon baya ga kirkire-kirkire kamar na Honcheonui, Angbuilgu, Jagyeokru da Cheugugi, kuma ya dauki nauyin malamai kamar Jang Yeong-sil da Choi Hae-san.

keyAchievements.title: Karfafa tsaro
keyAchievements.description: Ya tura Yi Jong-mu don mamaye Tsushima, sannan ya tura Choi Yun-deok da Kim Jong-seo zuwa arewa domin kafa shiyyoyi 4 da 6, inda ya fadada iyakokin kasar.

keyAchievements.title: Kafa tsarin siyasa
keyAchievements.description: Ya dauki mutane irin su Hwang Hui, Maeng Sa-seong, Yun Hoe, da Kim Jong-seo don kula da harkokin gwamnati, wanda ya zama asalin tsarin Uijeongbuseosaje.

keyAchievements.title: Kafa tsarin haraji
keyAchievements.description: Ya tabbatar da tsarin harajin kasa na Joseon ta hanyar kafa dokoki kamar Jeonbun 6-deungbeop da Yeonbun 9-deungbeop.

keyAchievements.title: Tattara litattafai
keyAchievements.description: Ya tattara litattafai daban-daban da suka hada da Worin Cheongangjigok, Yongbieocheonga, Nongsajikseol, da Goryeosa.

faq.question: Yaushe aka haifi Sarki Sejong Babba?
faq.answer: An haifi Sejong a ranar 15 ga Mayu, 1397 a Hanseong Junsubang a matsayin ɗa na uku ga Sarki Taejong da Sarauniya Wongyeong.

faq.question: Ta yaya Sarki Sejong ya hau karagar mulki?
faq.answer: Lokacin da babban wansa Yarima Yangnyeong ya rasa matsayinsa, an naɗa shi matsayin magajin gado, kuma a shekarar 1418 ya hau mulki bayan mahaifinsa Taejong ya janye.

faq.question: Menene babbar nasarar da Sarki Sejong ya samu?
faq.answer: Kirkirar Hunminjeongeum, wani ingantaccen tsarin haruffa na kimiyya wanda talakawa za su iya koya a saukake, yana daya daga cikin manyan nasarorin da ya samu.

faq.question: Wace irin rawa Sarki Sejong ya taka a fannin tsaro?
faq.answer: Ya aike da Yi Jong-mu don kwace Tsushima, sannan ya aike da Choi Yun-deok da Kim Jong-seo zuwa arewa inda suka fadada iyakokin kasar ta hanyar kafa shiyyoyi 4 da 6.

faq.question: Yaushe Sarki Sejong ya mutu?
faq.answer: Sarki Sejong ya mutu a ranar 30 ga Maris, 1450.

timeline.event: An haife shi a matsayin ɗan Philip II da Olympias a Pella, babban birnin Makidoniya.
Ya doke rundunonin Athens da Thebes a Yakin Chaeronea tare da Philip II.
Ya gudu daga Makidoniya tare da mahaifiyarsa kafin ya koma bayan wata 6.
Bayan kisan mahaifinsa Philip II, ya gaji karagar mulkin Makidoniya yana da shekaru 20.
Don tabbatar da iyakar arewa, ya yaki 'yan tawaye a Thrace, Triballi, da Illyria sannan ya murkushe tawayen Thebes kuma ya lalata birnin.
Ya tsallake Hellespont don fara mamaye Daular Achaemenid (Daular Farisa ta Farko) kuma ya sami nasara a Yakin Granicus.
Ya kai hari sannan ya ci Tyre, ya shiga Masar inda aka dauke shi a matsayin mai ceto.
Ya bar Masar zuwa Mesofotamiya, ya ci Darius III a Yakin Gaugamela kuma ya kama Babila.
Ya kai hari Indiya amma sojojinsa suka ki ci gaba, inda suka koma baya daga Kogin Hyphasis.
Ya mutu a Babila yana da shekaru 33.

keyAchievements.title: Ginin Babbar Daula
keyAchievements.description: Ya gina wata daula da ba a taba ganin irinta ba a yammacin Turai, tun daga Girka har zuwa Masar da arewa maso yammacin Indiya.

keyAchievements.title: Nasara a fagen Soja
keyAchievements.description: Ba a taba cin sa da yaki ba, wanda yasa ake ganinsa a matsayin daya daga cikin mafi nasarar shugabannin soja a tarihi.

keyAchievements.title: Rushewar Daular Farisa
keyAchievements.description: Ya murkushe sojojin Farisa a yakokin Issus da Gaugamela, wanda ya kai ga mutuwar Darius III kuma ya kawo karshen Daular Farisa ta Farko.

keyAchievements.title: Taimako wajen Al'adun Hellenism
keyAchievements.description: Ya gina birane masu suna 'Alexandria' a yankunan da ya ci, wanda ya bunkasa haduwar al'adun gabas da yamma da kirkirar al'adun Hellenistic.

keyAchievements.title: Siyasar Hadin Kan Gabas da Yamma
keyAchievements.description: Ya karbi al'adun Farisa, ya karfafa auren tsakanin Girkawa da mutanen yankunan da aka ci, kuma ya dauki ma'aikatan Farisa don hade gabas da yamma.

faq.question: Waye malamin Iskandar Makidoniye (Alexander the Great)?
faq.answer: Ya yi karatu a karkashin masanin falsafa Aristotle har zuwa shekaru 16, tare da Anaximenes na Lampsacus wanda shima ya koya masa.

faq.question: Wace irin daula Iskandar Makidoniye ya gina?
faq.answer: Ya gina daula da ta fara daga Girka har zuwa Masar a kudu da arewa maso yammacin Indiya a gabas, wacce bata da tamka a tarihi.

faq.question: Shin Iskandar Makidoniye ya taba faduwa a yaki?
faq.answer: Ba a taba cin sa da yaki ba, kuma ana daukarsa daya daga cikin jagororin soja mafi nasara a tarihi.

faq.question: Ta yaya Iskandar Makidoniye ya rusa Daular Farisa?
faq.answer: A yakokin Issus da Gaugamela, ya murkushe sojojin Farisa kuma ya kai ga mutuwar Darius III, inda ya rusa Daular Farisa ta farko.

faq.question: Wadanne birane Iskandar Makidoniye ya kafa?
faq.answer: Ya gina birane da dama da aka sa wa suna 'Alexandria', inda Alexandria ta Masar ita ce wacce ta fi shahara.

alexander-the-great.missingDataNote: An tabbatar da duk bayanan ne daga asalin majiyoyin da aka bayar.

timeline.event: Yuli 30, an haife shi a wani gari a yammacin Detroit, Michigan, Amurka.
Mahaifiyarsa ta mutu lokacin yana da shekaru 12.
Ya bar makaranta yana da shekaru 15 don zama makaniki.
Aka gayyace shi ya yi aiki a matsayin injiniya a kamfanin wutar lantarki na Edison.
Ya kirkiri motarsa ta farko wacce ke amfani da injin konewa na ciki (internal combustion engine).
Bayan ya bar kamfanin Edison, ya kafa Kamfanin Ford Motors yana da shekaru 40, inda ya fara kera Ford Model T ta hanyar tsarin taron sarrafawa (assembly line).
Ya wallafa littafinsa 'Yau da Gobe' (Today and Tomorrow).
Ya wallafa littafinsa 'Falsafar Masana'antata' (My Philosophy of Industry).
Afrilu 7, ya mutu yana da shekaru 84 a duniya.

keyAchievements.title: Kafa Kamfanin Ford Motor
keyAchievements.description: A shekarar 1903, yana da shekaru 40, ya kafa Kamfanin kerar motoci na Ford.

keyAchievements.title: Kera Motar Farko
keyAchievements.description: A 1892, ya kirkiri injin konewa na ciki wanda ya yi amfani dashi wajen kera mota.

keyAchievements.title: Gabatar da Tsarin Model T da Kera Da Yawa
keyAchievements.description: A 1903, ya kawo tsarin taron sarrafawa (belt conveyor system) a karon farko a duniya don fara kera motocin Ford Model T da yawa.

keyAchievements.title: Tsarin Fordism
keyAchievements.description: Ya kafa falsafar gudanarwa guda hudu da suka hada da barin tsoron gaba, rashin yin aiki don gasa, sanya taimako gaban riba, da kerawa a farashi mai sauki don sayarwa a farashi mai sauki.

keyAchievements.title: Bunkasa Tsarin Ford
keyAchievements.description: Ya gabatar da gangamin 3S wanda ya shafi daidaita kayayyaki, saukake bangarori, da kwarewar aiki ta amfani da na'urar jigilar kaya wanda ya inganta aikin masu aiki.

keyAchievements.title: Inganta Rayuwar Ma'aikata
keyAchievements.description: Bayan kafa kamfaninsa, ya fito da sharudda na musamman ga ma'aikata kamar 'awanni 8 a rana da mafi karancin albashi na dala 5'.

faq.question: Yaushe aka haifi Henry Ford kuma yaushe ya mutu?
faq.answer: An haifi Henry Ford a ranar 30 ga Yuli, 1863, kuma ya mutu a ranar 7 ga Afrilu, 1947 yana da shekaru 84.

faq.question: Wane kamfani Henry Ford ya kafa?
faq.answer: Ya kafa Kamfanin Ford Motor (Ford Motor Company) wajen kera motoci a shekarar 1903.

faq.question: Wadanne ne manyan nasarorin Henry Ford?
faq.answer: Ya kera mota a shekarar 1892 kuma a shekarar 1903 ya kirkiro tsarin taron sarrafawa wanda ya haifar da kerar motocin Ford Model T da yawa.

faq.question: Wace alaka ce tsakanin Henry Ford da Thomas Edison?
faq.answer: Henry Ford ya yi aiki a matsayin babban injiniya a kamfanin da Edison ya kafa, inda aka gayyace shi yin aiki a kamfanin hasken wutar lantarki na Edison a 1890.

timeline.event: An haife shi a matsayin ɗan fari a gidan masu hannu da shuni na dawaki a Arpinum, Italiya.
Ya yi aikin soja.
Yakin basasa tsakanin Gaius Marius da Sulla ya barke, a lokacin ya karanci falsafar Plato da Aristotle a karkashin Philo.
Ya fara aiki a matsayin lauya a karon farko.
Ya sami daukaka bayan ya kare Roscius da aka zarga da kashe mahaifinsa.
Ya bar Roma zuwa Athens da Rhodes don karatun kissa (rhetoric) da falsafa karkashin Posidonius.
Ya shiga ofishin gwamnati a matsayin ma'aji (quaestor).
An zabe shi a matsayin Aedile; ya dauki shari'ar Verres, inda ya tabbatar da laifin Verres kuma ya zama babban lauyan Roma inda ya rubuta jawabai kan Verres.
An zabe shi Praetor, ya rubuta jawabin goyon bayan Pompey sannan ya wallafa kariyarsa ga Murena.
Ya zama Consul wanda shine babban matsayin gudanarwa, ya hana juyin mulkin Catiline, kuma ya gabatar da jawabai kan Catiline.
Ya wallafa kariya ga Archias.
Tsarin mulki na mutum uku tsakanin Caesar, Pompey, da Crassus ya fara, wanda ya jefa shi cikin matsalar siyasa.
Dokar Tribune Clodius Pulcher ta tilasta shi barin Roma zuwa gudun hijira a Makidoniya, inda aka lalata gidajensa.
Ya koma Roma da taimakon magoya bayansa inda aka biya shi diyya kan asarar da ya yi.
Ya wallafa 'Game da Mai Magana' (De Oratore).
Ya wallafa 'Yadda Ake Tsara Jawabi' (De Partitione Oratoria).
An zabe shi a matsayin Augur don komawa ofishin jama'a.
Ya wallafa 'Game da Dokoki' (De Legibus).
An zabe shi gwamnan Cilicia kuma ya wallafa 'Game da Jamhuriya' (De Re Publica).
Yakin basasa tsakanin Caesar da Pompey ya barke kuma ya shiga bangaren Pompey bayan an zabe shi Gwamnan Capua.
Caesar ya ci Pompey a Pharsalus, kuma Cicero ya koma Italiya da amincewar Caesar.
Ya wallafa litattafai kamar 'Stoic Paradoxes', 'Brutus', da 'The Orator'.
Yarsa mai daraja Tullia ta mutu, sannan ya wallafa 'Consolation', 'Hortensius', da 'Game da Yanayin Alloli'.
An kashe Caesar, kuma Cicero ya dawo fagen siyasa.
Ya gabatar da jawabai na Philippic don sukar Mark Antony.
Ya wallafa litattafai da yawa da suka hada da 'Divination', 'Akan Tsufa', da 'Akan Ayyuka'.
Octavian, Antony, da Lepidus sun fara Tsarin Mulkin Mutum Uku na Biyu.
An kashe shi da sojojin Antony a Formia.

keyAchievements.title: Tabbatar da Harshen Latin na gargajiya
keyAchievements.description: Cicero ne ya tsara tsarin harshen Latin na gargajiya, kuma ana ganin salonta a matsayin mizani na harshen.

keyAchievements.title: Samun Matsayin Babban Lauyan Roma
keyAchievements.description: A shari'ar Verres ta 70 K.Z., ya ci lauyan da yafi shahara a lokacin, inda ya zama babban lauyan Roma.

keyAchievements.title: Hana juyin mulkin Catiline a matsayin Consul
keyAchievements.description: A lokacin da yake Consul a 63 K.Z., ya hana juyin mulkin Catiline tare da ceto jamhuriyar Roma.

keyAchievements.title: Shigo da falsafar Girka cikin Latin
keyAchievements.description: A lokacin da ya daina siyasa, ya dukufa wajen fassara ka'idojin falsafar Girka zuwa harshen Latin.

faq.question: Yaushe kuma a ina aka haifi Cicero kuma yaushe ya mutu?
faq.answer: An haifi Cicero a ranar 3 ga Janairu, 106 K.Z. a Arpinum, Italiya, kuma an kashe shi a Formia a ranar 7 ga Disamba, 43 K.Z.

faq.question: Yaya kimar siyasar Cicero take?
faq.answer: Akimar siyasarsa gaba daya ba a girmama ta, inda ake daukarsa a matsayin mai hangen nesa da ya rude cikin siyasa da wani mai amfani da damar dake gabansa.

faq.question: Wane tasiri Cicero ya yi akan harshen Latin na gargajiya?
faq.answer: Cicero ne ya kafa tubalin harshen Latin na gargajiya, wanda yasa salonsa ya zama ma'auni wajen koyon harshen Latin har wa yau.

faq.question: Ta yaya Cicero ya mutu?
faq.answer: A ranar 7 ga Disamba, 43 K.Z., ya zama abin da Antony zai kashe saboda mulkin mutum uku, sannan aka yanke kansa da hannayensa aka nuna su a dandalin Roma.

timeline.event: An haifi Helen Adams Keller a gonar Ivy Green da ke Tuscumbia, Alabama, Amurka.
Mahaifiyarta Kate Keller ta karanta littafin Charles Dickens 'American Notes' kuma ta ziyarci J. Julian Chisolm a Baltimore don neman shawara.
Anne Sullivan ta isa gidan Helen don fara koya mata karatu.
Helen ta shiga makarantar Perkins ga makafi.
Ta rubuta 'The Frost King' tana da shekaru 11.
Helen Keller da Anne Sullivan sun koma New York don zuwa makarantun kutare da kurame na Wright-Humason da Horace Mann.
Ta koma Massachusetts kuma ta halarci Makarantar 'Yan Mata ta Cambridge.
An shigar da ita kwalejin Radcliffe, makarantar 'yan mata a karkashin Jami'ar Harvard.
Ta wallafa tarihin rayuwarta 'The Story of My Life' tare da Anne Sullivan da mijinta John Macy.
Ta kammala karatunta daga Radcliffe College tana da shekaru 24, wanda ya sa ta zama mutum na farko kurma da kuma makaho da ya sami digirin farko.
Ta wallafa 'The World I Live In'.
Ta shiga Jam'iyyar gurguzu ta Amurka tana da shekaru 29.
Ta shiga kungiyar Industrial Workers of the World (IWW).
An buga jeren rubutun 'Out of the Dark' wanda yayi bayani akan gurguzu.
Ta kafa kungiyar 'Helen Keller International' tare da George Kessler.
Ta yi rubutu don IWW.
Ta fito a wani fim maras sauti mai suna 'Deliverance'.
Ta taimaka wajen kafa American Civil Liberties Union (ACLU).
An buga littafin 'My Religion'.
Anne Sullivan ta mutu.
Ta ziyarci yankin Akita na Japan sannan aka bata karen Akita mai suna 'Kamikaze-go' bayan ta tambaya akan karen Hachiko.
Bayan mutuwar 'Kamikaze-go', gwamnatin Japan ta bata dan uwansa 'Kenzan-go' a matsayin kyauta.
An aiwatar da aikin rubutun William Gibson 'The Miracle Worker'.
Polly Thomson ta mutu sakamakon bugun jini (stroke).
Ta yi fama da bugun jini, wanda yasa ta shafe karshen rayuwarta a gida.
Fim din 'The Miracle Worker' da Anne Bancroft da Patty Duke suka fito ya lashe kyautar Oscar.
Ta sami lambar yabo ta Shugaban Kasa daga Shugaba Lyndon B. Johnson.
An shigar da ita cikin dakin shahararrun mata na Amurka a Baje Kolin Duniya na New York.
Ta mutu tana da shekaru 88 a gidanta a Arcan Ridge, Easton, Connecticut.
Ta zama daya daga cikin mutane 18 mafi daraja a karni na 20 a jerin Gallup.
Jihar Alabama ta sanya hoton Helen Keller akan tsabar kudi na kwata (quarter).
An kara wani mutum-mutumin gangar jiki na Helen Keller zuwa dakin nuna zane-zane na Amurka.

keyAchievements.title: Samun digiri na farko a matsayin kurma kuma makaho
keyAchievements.description: A 1904, ta zama mace kurma kuma makauniya ta farko da ta kammala karatun digirin farko na Arts a kwalejin Radcliffe.

keyAchievements.title: Mawallafiya da malama
keyAchievements.description: Ta wallafa litattafai 12 tare da kasidu daban-daban kuma ta zama marubuciya kuma malama a Amurka.

keyAchievements.title: Yin fafutuka a Gurguzu da Hakkin Dan Adam
keyAchievements.description: Ta shiga kungiyoyi daban-daban na hakkin masu kada kuri'a, tabbatar da zaman lafiya, adawa da hukumcin kisa da wariyar launin fata.

keyAchievements.title: Kafa Helen Keller International
keyAchievements.description: A 1915, ta kafa 'Helen Keller International' don bincike akan lafiyar gani, abinci, da walwala.

keyAchievements.title: Taimakawa wajen kafa ACLU
keyAchievements.description: Ta bada gudunmawa wajen kafa American Civil Liberties Union (ACLU) a 1920.

keyAchievements.title: Kyaututtuka na Kasa
keyAchievements.description: Ta sami lambar yabon Shugaban Kasa a 1964, an shigar da ita cikin dakunan shahararrun mata a 1965, kuma an karrama ta bayan mutuwarta.

faq.question: Yaushe aka haifi Helen Keller kuma yaushe ta mutu?
faq.answer: An haife ta a ranar 27 ga Yuni, 1880 kuma ta mutu a ranar 1 ga Yuni, 1968 tana da shekaru 88.

faq.question: Ta yaya Helen Keller ta rasa jininta da ganinta?
faq.answer: A watanni 19 da haihuwa, an gano tana da cutar zazzabin scarlet da sankarau (meningitis), wanda ya jawo mata makanta da kurmantaka na dindindin.

faq.question: Wanene ya fi tasiri wajen ilimantar da Helen Keller?
faq.answer: Anne Sullivan wacce ta zo gidan Helen a Maris 1887 kuma ta koya mata harshe ta hanyar rubuta kalmomi akan hannunta.

faq.question: Wadanne kungiyoyin kare hakki Helen Keller ta shiga?
faq.answer: Ta kasance mai ra'ayin gurguzu wacce ta tsaya akan hakkin mata, wariyar launin fata, hakkin kananan yara, da sauransu.

faq.question: Wane shahararren fim akayi akan Helen Keller?
faq.answer: Fim din 'The Miracle Worker' yayi bayanin rayuwarta da alakarta da Anne Sullivan kuma fim din ya ci kyautar Oscar a 1962.

helen-keller.missingDataNote: Ba a fadi ainihin shekarar da ta rasa ganinta da jininta a asalin majiyar ba bayan cutar data kamata tana da watanni 19.

timeline.event: An yi masa baftisma a cocin St. Remigius na Katolika a Bonn, Jamus.
An nuna shi a matsayin 'yaron abin al'ajabi' yana da shekaru shida a fosta ta farko.
Ya fara karatun kida a karkashin Christian Gottlob Neefe a Bonn.
Ya fara aiki a matsayin mataimakin mai buga garaya (organist) na Neefe.
An wallafa aikinsa na farko, 'Bambancin Piano Guda Tara akan Taken Tattakin Dressler, WoO 63'.
An wallafa 'Piano Sonatas, WoO 47' guda uku.
Ya fara aikin albashi a coci kuma an nada shi a matsayin mai garaya na biyu na fada na din-din-din.
An tilasta wa mahaifinsa Johann barin aiki, kuma an ba da umarnin a rika baiwa Beethoven rabin kudin fanshonsa don ciyar da iyalinsa.
An gabatar da shi ga Joseph Haydn wanda ya tsaya a Bonn a kan hanyarsa ta zuwa Landan.
An umarce shi ya rubuta kidan rawa, 'Musik zu einem Ritterballett, WoO 1'.
Haydn ya sake ganin sa a Bonn kuma ya yi alkawarin daukarsa a matsayin dalibi.
Ya bar Bonn zuwa Vienna da taimakon magabata.
Ya yi suna a Vienna a matsayin babban mai buga fiyano.
Bonn ya koma karkashin mulkin Faransa.
Ya kade dayan wakokinsa na fiyano a wasansa na farko a Vienna.
Ya shirya ayyukansa na Op. 1 don wallafawa.
Ya yi rangadi a biranen Turai kamar Prague, Dresden, Leipzig, da Berlin.
Ya koma Vienna.
Ya fara gano cewa yana da matsalar ji.
Ya daina rangadin kide-kide bayan jin sa ya ci gaba da tabarbarewa.
Ya rubuta wakokinsa na farko na kida (string quartets, Op. 18).
Ya wallafa Piano Sonata lamba 8 'Pathétique', Op. 13.
An fara gudanar da wasan kidansa na farko (Symphony No. 1) a Burgtheater.
An wallafa wakokinsa shida na farko na kida, Op. 18.
Ya wallafa Piano Sonata lamba 14, Op. 27-2 ('Moonlight Sonata').
Ya koma Heiligenstadt a wajen Vienna kuma ya rubuta wasiyyarsa ta Heiligenstadt Testament.
Ya rubuta Symphony No. 3 'Eroica'.
Goge sunan Napoleon a kofin Symphony No. 3 bayan jin Napoleon ya bayyana kansa a matsayin sarki.
An gabatar da Symphony No. 3 'Eroica' a karon farko.
An fara wasan kwaikwayon opera na Fidelio.
An gudanar da babban wasan sadaka wanda ya hada da Symphony na 5 da na 6.
An kammala kidan Egmont (Op. 84).
Ya hadu da Goethe a Teplitz kuma ya rubuta wasikar soyayya ta shafuka 10 ga 'masoyiyarsa ta dindindin'.
An yi wasan Symphony No. 7 a taron sadaka ga wadanda abin ya shafa a yakin.
Ya fara amfani da na'urar kara ji (ear trumpet) wanda Maelzel ya kirkira.
Dan uwansa Kaspar ya mutu, inda ya afka rigima kan rikon dan uwansa Karl.
Ya yi nasarar samun rikon dan uwansa Karl.
Lafiyarsa ta samu sauki kuma dan uwansa Karl mai shekaru sha daya ya dawo da zama dashi.
Bayan gwabzawa a shari'a, ya dawo da rikon dan uwansa Karl.
An fara wasan Symphony No. 9 da Missa Solemnis a Kärntnertortheater tare da girmamawa sosai.
Ya koma gidan dan uwansa Johann a Gneixendorf tsawon watanni uku tare da dan yayansa.
Ya gaya wa Schindler da wasu cewa, 'Ku tafa hannu, abokai, wasan barkwanci ya kare'.
Ya mutu yana da shekaru 56.

keyAchievements.title: Aiki a matsayin mai tsara kida da mai buga fiyano
keyAchievements.description: Kasancewarsa shahararren mai tsara kida a yammacin Turai da kuma kasancewa muhimmin mutum wajen sauyawar zamani tsakanin kida na gargajiya da na zamani.

keyAchievements.title: Ana masa lakabi da 'Mawakin Waliyyi' (Musical Saint)
keyAchievements.description: Ana yawan bayyana shi a matsayin gwarzo ko wani waliyyi na kida a cikin tarihin al'ada.

keyAchievements.title: Manyan ayyukansa
keyAchievements.description: Symphony No. 3, 5, 6, 9, tare da Sonata na Pathetique da Moonlight suna daga cikin sanannun ayyukansa.

keyAchievements.title: Wakarsa ta farko data fito
keyAchievements.description: A watan Maris 1783, ya fitar da wakarsa ta farko 'Bambancin Piano Guda Tara akan Taken Tattakin Dressler, WoO 63'.

keyAchievements.title: Wakokin Fiyano na farko (Piano Sonatas)
keyAchievements.description: Wakokin fiyano guda uku na WoO 47 da aka fitar a 1783 sun nuna hazakarsa a matsayin kwararre da wuri.

keyAchievements.title: Babban wasan Symphony No. 9
keyAchievements.description: Symphony ta 9 wacce ya rubuta daga 1818 zuwa 1823 an yabawa wannan aiki sosai domin ta bude wani sabon shafi na hikima da fasaha a kida.

faq.question: A ina kuma yaushe aka haifi Beethoven?
faq.answer: An haife shi a Bonn, Jamus, kuma an rubuta batismarsa a ranar 17 ga Disamba, 1770.

faq.question: Wadanne ne manyan ayyukan Beethoven?
faq.answer: Symphony No. 3, 5, 6, 9, da kuma Moonlight Sonata sune daga cikin wakokinsa da suka fi shahara.

faq.question: Yaushe Beethoven ya mutu kuma menene dalilin mutuwarsa?
faq.answer: Ya mutu a ranar 26 ga Maris, 1827 yana da shekaru 56. Ana zargin ya mutu ne saboda cutar hanta ko pneumonia.

faq.question: Shin Beethoven ya zama kurma dindindin?
faq.answer: Ko da yake jinsa ya cigaba da raguwa a hankali, bai zama kurma dindindin ba, har a karshen rayuwarsa yana iya banbanta manyan sauti.

beethoven.missingDataNote: Ba a fadi ainihin ranar haihuwarsa ba a rubutun asali, kuma ana zargin cututtuka da yawa sune sanadin mutuwarsa.

timeline.event: An haifi Marcus Aurelius Antoninus a Roma.
A bisa umarnin Diognetus, ya sanya tufafin masana falsafa kuma ya amince da salon rayuwarsu.
Antoninus Pius wanda zai gaji Hadrian ya dauke shi a matsayin danta.
Antoninus Pius ya zama sarki bayan mutuwar Hadrian.
Ya auri Faustina diyarta Antoninus Pius.
Marcus da Lucius Verus sun zama sarakuna tare bayan mutuwar Antoninus Pius.
Barkar yakin Parthian.
Marcus ya bayyana 'ya'yansa tagwaye Annius da Commodus a matsayin masu gajen shi.
Yaki da kabilun Jamus (Germanic tribes) ya barke.
Sarki Lucius ya mutu saboda annoba (plague).
Ya fara gudanar da mulki tare da dansa Commodus.
Ya mutu a sansanin soja kusa da Vindobona ko Sirmium yana da shekaru 58.

keyAchievements.title: Sarkin Daular Roma
keyAchievements.description: Sarki na 16 na Daular Roma kuma na karshe daga cikin Sarakuna Biyar na Kwarai, kuma na karshe a lokacin Pax Romana.

keyAchievements.title: Masanin falsafar Stoic
keyAchievements.description: Ya rubuta 'Meditations' a matsayin masanin falsafa wanda ya ba da muhimman bayanai kan falsafar Stoic.

keyAchievements.title: Nasara a fagen Soja
keyAchievements.description: Ya yi yaki cikin nasara da Daular Parthian, Armeniya, da kuma kabilun Jamus.

keyAchievements.title: Gyaran Kudi
keyAchievements.description: Ya dauki matakin daidaita kudin azurfa na denarius a Roma.

faq.question: Wane irin mutum ne Marcus Aurelius?
faq.answer: Shi ne sarki na 16 na Daular Roma, masanin falsafar Stoic, kuma na karshe daga cikin Sarakunan Kwarai Biyar.

faq.question: Menene manyan nasarorinsa na soja?
faq.answer: Ya yi yaki cikin nasara da Daular Parthian a Gabas kuma ya murkushe kabilun Jamus a yakin Marcomannic.

faq.question: Wane littafi ne mai muhimmanci da ya rubuta?
faq.answer: Littafin da ya rubuta mai suna 'Meditations' yana da muhimmanci sosai wajen fahimtar falsafar Stoic.

faq.question: Wadanne matsaloli Daular Roma ta fuskanta a lokacin mulkinsa?
faq.answer: Akwai yake-yake da dama da kuma Annobar Antonine (Antonine plague) wanda ya kashe kusan mutane miliyan 5.

timeline.event: An haife shi a Corduba (Cordoba ta Spain a yanzu).
Bayan ya shafe lokaci a Masar, ya koma Roma inda ya fara aikin siyasa da shari'a.
Sarki Claudius ya yi masa gudun hijira zuwa tsibirin Corsica kan zargin zina.
An dawo da shi daga gudun hijira don ya zama malamin Nero, wanda zai zama sarki a nan gaba.
Sarki Nero ya tilasta masa kashe kansa kan zargin saka hannu a makircin Piso.
An haife shi a Jihar Lu karkashin mahaifinsa Shu Lianghe da mahaifiyarsa Yan Zhengzai.
Mahaifinsa ya mutu.
Ya yi aure.
Mahaifiyarsa ta mutu.
Ya sami danta Li.
Ya bude makaranta a Jihar Lu inda ya fara karantar da dalibai.
Ya fara aikin gwamnati a matsayin mai kula da asusu (Weili) da mai kula da filaye (Sizhi).
Ya bi Sarki Zhao na Lu zuwa Jihar Qi lokacin Tawayen 'Huan Uku'.
Ya koma daga Jihar Qi.
An ba shi mukamin babban magatakarda na tsaro (Dasikou).
Bayan ya bata rai da gwamnati, ya bar Jihar Lu zuwa wasu kasashe har tsawon shekaru 14.
Ya yi bakin ciki saboda mutuwar danta da wasu daga cikin dalibansa.
Ya mutu yana da shekaru 72 a gaban dalibansa.

keyAchievements.title: Kafa Makarantar Farko a Kasar Sin
keyAchievements.description: Shi ne ya kafa makarantar farko a tarihin kasar Sin inda ya karantar da dalibai.

keyAchievements.title: Kawar da Mugunyar Al'adar Binne Mutane Masu Rai
keyAchievements.description: Ya baiwa sarki shawara don kawar da mugunyar al'adar binne mutane tare da gawa.

keyAchievements.title: Maido da Tsohuwar Kasar Lu
keyAchievements.description: A tattaunawarsa da Jihar Qi, ya nuna kwazo wajen dawo da kasar da Jihar Lu ta rasa.

keyAchievements.title: Ilmantarwa akan Al'adu shida
keyAchievements.description: Ya karantar da dalibai ta amfani da litattafan gargajiya shida wato Book of Changes, Odes, History, Rites, Music, da Spring and Autumn Annals.

keyAchievements.title: Da'awar Falsafar 'Ren' (Mutuntaka)
keyAchievements.description: Ya jaddada falsafar 'Ren' a matsayin babban makasudin dabi'ar dan adam.

faq.question: Wane irin mutum ne Confucius?
faq.answer: Masanin siyasa ne, masanin falsafa, kuma malami a zamanin 'Spring and Autumn' na kasar Sin wanda ake kallo a matsayin uban Confucianism.

faq.question: Menene babban akidar Confucius?
faq.answer: Babban akidarsa itace 'Ren' wanda ke nufin mutuntaka da kyautatawa ga dan adam.

faq.question: Wane irin harkar ilimi Confucius ya gudanar?
faq.answer: Ya kafa makarantar farko a kasar Sin inda ya karantar da litattafan gargajiya kamar Book of Songs da Book of Changes.

faq.question: Yaushe Confucius ya mutu?
faq.answer: Ya mutu a shekarar 479 K.Z. yana da shekaru 72.

timeline.event: An haife shi a tsohon garin Athens ta Girka.
Ya shiga yake-yake guda uku kai tsaye a matsayin soja.
Ya fara aiki a matsayin malami don wayar da kan matasa.
Ya zama mamba a cikin Majalisar Dattawa 500 inda ya yi siyasa na shekara guda.
An gurfanar da shi kan laifin sabo da gurbata matasa, kuma an yanke masa hukuncin kisa ta hanyar shan guba yana da shekaru 71.

keyAchievements.title: Mutum na Farko a Falsafar Yammacin Turai
keyAchievements.description: Ana ganin shi a matsayin mutum na farko a Falsafar yammacin Turai domin ya shafe rayuwarsa yana tattaunawa akan al'amuran falsafa.

keyAchievements.title: Fitar da Tsarin 'Maieutics'
keyAchievements.description: Ya kirkiro tsarin Maieutics inda ake gano kura-kurai ta hanyar tambayoyi da jagoranci zuwa ga tunani mai kyau.

keyAchievements.title: Hada Mutunci da Ilimi
keyAchievements.description: Ya jaddada tsarin da'a inda ya nuna cewa mugunta tana faruwa ne saboda rashin ilimi, yayin da mutunci ya samo asali daga tunani mai kyau.

keyAchievements.title: An kira shi da 'Mafi Girman Malami na Dan Adam'
keyAchievements.description: Mutane da dama sun yaba da hazakarsa da tsarin da'arsa wanda yasa aka bashi sunan mafi girman malami a tarihin dan adam.

faq.question: Shin Socrates ya bar wani rubutaccen littafi?
faq.answer: A'a, bai rubuta komai ba; an samo ra'ayoyinsa ne ta hanyar dalibansa da mutanen zamaninsa.

faq.question: Shin Socrates ne ya fadi cewa 'mummunar doka ita ma doka ce'?
faq.answer: Babu wata shaida da ke nuna Socrates ya fadi haka, kalmar ta samo asali ne daga masanin shari'a Ulpian a zamanin Roma.

faq.question: Ta yaya Socrates ya mutu?
faq.answer: An yi masa shari'a kan laifin 'sabo' da 'gurbata matasa' kuma aka yanke masa hukuncin kisa ta hanyar shan guba.

timeline.event: Ana kyautata zaton an haife shi ne a jihar Chu a lokacin Daular Zhou.
Ya yi aiki a matsayin ma'aikacin rumbun ajiya na gidan sarautar Zhou.
Kamar yadda labari ya nuna, ya hadu da matashin Confucius inda suka tattauna akan falsafa da al'adu.
Ya bar Daular Zhou wacce ke durkushewa, inda ya hau saniya ya nufi yamma.
Bayan ya rubuta 'Tao Te Ching' a kofar iyakar yamma, ya bace a tarihi.
An haife shi a Stagira dake yankin Thrace a arewacin Girka.
Ya shiga makarantar Plato (Academy) yana da shekaru 17.
Kafin mutuwar Plato, ya tafi Atarneus a bisa goron gayyata na Hermias.
Sarki Philip II na Makidoniya ya sa ya koma Mieza a matsayin malamin Yarima Alexander.
Bayan Alexander ya fara gudanar da mulki, ya koma Stagira don cigaba da bincike.
Ya koma Athens inda ya kafa makarantar Lyceum kuma ya shafe shekaru 12 yana karantarwa da bincike.
Bayan mutuwar Iskandar Makidoniye, ya gudu zuwa Chalcis wato garin mahaifiyarsa don gujewa masu adawa da Makidoniya.
Ya mutu sakamakon ciwon ciki yana da shekaru 63.

keyAchievements.title: Kirkirar Tsarin Falsafar Yammacin Turai
keyAchievements.description: Shi ya fara kirkirar tsari mai yawa na falsafar yammacin Turai wanda ya hada da da'a, kimiyya, siyasa, da sauransu.

keyAchievements.title: Kafa dakin karatu a Lyceum da gidan ajiye dabbobi
keyAchievements.description: Tare da taimakon Iskandar Makidoniye, ya gina dakin karatu a makarantar Lyceum sannan ya kafa gidan ajiye dabbobi na farko a duniya.

keyAchievements.title: Gaba a Fannin Logic
keyAchievements.description: Ya zama jigo a fannin ilimin logic ta hanyar wallafa ayyukansa sannan kuma ya kirkiro tsarin 'syllogism'.

keyAchievements.title: Bincike a fannin Dabbobi
keyAchievements.description: Ya lura da kuma rarraba dabbobi sama da nau'i 500 inda ya bari kyakkyawan bayani a kansu.

faq.question: Waye malamin Aristotle kuma waye dalibinsa?
faq.answer: Aristotle dalibi ne na Plato, kuma shi ne malamin Iskandar Makidoniye (Alexander the Great).

faq.question: Wadanne fannoni Aristotle ya wallafa littattafai akai?
faq.answer: Ya rubuta a kan darussa da yawa kamar physics, biology, dabbobi, siyasa, da sauransu.

faq.question: Mene ne asalin ilimin logic na Aristotle?
faq.answer: Misali mafi shahara a cikin ilimin logic na Aristotle shi ne tsarin 'syllogism' (ƙin yarda da hankali).

timeline.event: Haihuwa
A bisa gayyatar Dionysius II, ya tafi Sicily don gwada siyasarsa ta gari.
Mutuwa
Shekarar karshe da makarantar Academy da Plato ya kafa tayi aiki.

keyAchievements.title: Kirkirar Kwayoyin Ra'ayi na Falsafa (Objective Idealism)
keyAchievements.description: Shi ne masanin falsafar Girka da ya kirkiri tsarin Kwayoyin Ra'ayi.

keyAchievements.title: Kafa Academy
keyAchievements.description: Ya kafa kuma ya koyar a Academy, wacce ita ce makarantar farko dake matsayin jami'a a duniya.

keyAchievements.title: Rubuta Jawabai na Falsafa
keyAchievements.description: Ya rubuta darussa a kan siyasa, da'a, da sauransu ta hanyar tattaunawa.

faq.question: Waye Plato?
faq.answer: Plato ɗalibi ne ga Socrates kuma malami ga Aristotle, sannan shi ne wanda ya kirkiri tsarin falsafa na 'Objective Idealism'.

faq.question: Wadanne ne manyan nasarorin Plato?
faq.answer: Ya kirkiri tsarin Idealism, ya kafa makarantar Academy, sannan ya fitar da Falsafar sa kan Sarakuna.

timeline.event: An haife shi a Stratford, Ingila.
Saboda tabarbarewar arzikin gidan, ya bar makaranta ya koma taimakawa a gida.
Ya auri Anne Hathaway wacce ta girme shi da shekaru takwas, yana da shekaru 18.
Ya sami takardar amincewar aure a kotun majami'ar Worcester.
Ya sami diyarsa Susanna.
An haifi tagwayen yara Hamnet da Judith.
Ya isa birnin London.
Ya shafe kimanin shekaru 24 yana rubuta wasannin kwaikwayo inda ya fitar da wasanni 38 da suka hada da na ban dariya da na bakin ciki.
Ana kyautata zaton cewa ya zama sanannen marubucin wasan kwaikwayo a London.
Ya wallafa wakar 'Venus and Adonis'.
Ya wallafa wakar 'Lucrece' sannan ya zama marubucin wasan kwaikwayo ga kungiyar Lord Chamberlain's Men.
An nuna wasansa 'A Midsummer Night's Dream' inda ya samu karbuwa sosai.
Kungiyar Lord Chamberlain's Men ta gina filin wasa na Globe kusa da kogin Thames.
Bayan mutuwar Sarauniya Elizabeth I, kungiyar ta canza suna zuwa King's Men.
Diyarsa Susanna ta auri likita John Hall.
An wallafa wakokinsa na 'Shakespeare's Sonnets'.
Ya dawo garinsu na Stratford 'yan shekaru kadan kafin mutuwarsa.
An gayyace shi a matsayin shaida a kotu dangane da wani aure.
Ya sayi wani tsohon gida a London Blackfriars.
Karamin diyarsa Judith ta auri Thomas Quiney.
Ya mutu inda ya bar matarsa da 'ya'yansa biyu.
An fitar da cikakken kundin wasanninsa da ya kunshi wasanni 36.

keyAchievements.title: Matsayi a matsayin Mafi Girman Marubucin Ingila
keyAchievements.description: Ya hau matsayin babban marubuci a lokacin ransa kuma ya samu yabo sosai.

keyAchievements.title: Kirkirar Littattafan Gargajiya
keyAchievements.description: Wasan kwaikwayonsa kamar 'Romeo and Juliet' da 'Hamlet' sun zama abin misali a tsakanin mutane.

keyAchievements.title: Gaba a Harshen Turanci
keyAchievements.description: Ayyukansa sun ba da gagarumar gudunmawa wajen inganta harshen Turanci na zamani.

faq.question: Shin William Shakespeare ya sami ilimin jami'a?
faq.answer: A'a, bai sami kowane ilimi na gaba da sakandare ba, amma hazakarsa ta sa ya zama babban marubuci.

faq.question: Wadanne ne manyan wasanninsa na bakin ciki guda hudu?
faq.answer: Wasanninsa guda hudu na bakin ciki (Tragedies) sune 'Hamlet', 'Othello', 'King Lear', da 'Macbeth'.

william-shakespeare.missingDataNote: Ba a da cikakken bayani game da shekarun kuruciyarsa da ainihin farkon lokacin da ya fara rubuta wasannin kwaikwayo.

timeline.event: An haife shi a Ulm na masarautar Württemberg a Jamus.
Ya koma Switzerland.
Don gujewa aikin soja, ya bar shaidar dan kasar Jamus kuma ya shiga shirin koyon lissafi da Physics a Polytechnic na Zurich.
Ya ci jarrabawar physics da lissafi kuma an bashi diploma.
Ya zama dan kasar Switzerland.
Ya auri Mileva Marić kuma ya sami aiki a ofishin duba kirkiro na Switzerland da ke Bern.
Ya sami digirinsa na uku daga Jami'ar Zurich kuma ya fitar da kasidu guda hudu da suka juyar da al'amuran kimiya.
An nada shi malami a Jami'ar Bern.
Ya zama farfesa a Jami'ar Zurich.
Ya zama cikakken farfesa a Jami'ar Charles-Ferdinand da ke Prague.
Ya dawo Berlin don shiga cibiyar kimiya ta Prussian da Jami'ar Humboldt.
Ya kammala ka'idarsa ta General Relativity.
Ya zama darekta a cibiyar Kaiser Wilhelm Institute for Physics kuma ya sake zama dan kasar Jamus.
Ya auri Elsa Löwenthal bayan sakin matarsa ta farko kuma tsinkayensa ya zama gaskiya a duniya baki daya.
Ya lashe kyautar Nobel ta Physics.
Ya yi tafiye-tafiye zuwa Asiya da Palestine.
Sakamakon hawawan Hitler kan mulki, ya kasa komawa Jamus don haka ya bar shaidar dan kasarsa ya koma Amurka dindindin.
Ya sanya hannu a wasika zuwa ga Shugaba Roosevelt don gargaɗi a kan shirin Jamus na yin makamin nukiliya.
Ya zama dan kasar Amurka.
Ya mutu yana da shekaru 76.

keyAchievements.title: Samar da Ka'idojin Relativity
keyAchievements.description: Ya canza yadda ake fahimtar sarari da lokaci ta hanyar samar da Special da General Relativity.

keyAchievements.title: Samar da Lissafin E=mc²
keyAchievements.description: Ya samar da lissafin E=mc² wanda ke nuna dangantaka tsakanin nauyi da karfi.

keyAchievements.title: Ka'idar Photoelectric Effect
keyAchievements.description: Ya nuna cewa haske yana aiki a matsayin barbashi (photons), wanda yasa ya lashe kyautar Nobel a Physics.

faq.question: Meyasa Albert Einstein ya sami lambar yabo ta Nobel?
faq.answer: Ya sami kyautar Nobel a 1921 a fannin Physics don ayyukansa a kan 'photoelectric effect'.

faq.question: Menene mafi shaharar kirkirar Einstein?
faq.answer: Lissafinsa na E=mc² sannan da ka'idojinsa na Relativity wanda suka canza kimiyya.

faq.question: Meyasa Einstein ya bar Jamus zuwa Amurka?
faq.answer: Sakamakon hawawan Adolf Hitler a kan karagar mulki a shekarar 1933 wanda ya kawo cikas ga Yahudawa.
